creator: j@uriah.heep.sax.de
text:
send-pr(1) pre-initializes the Organization: field with the contents
of ~/.signature, which appears to be bogus:

|| >Organization:   cheers, J"org
|| 
|| joerg_wunsch@uriah.heep.sax.de -- http://www.sax.de/~joerg/
|| Never trust an operating system you don't have sources for. ;-)

Fix: 

dunno
How-To-Repeat: 
	use send-pr
